# OCCP — OpenCloud Control Plane

> Agent Control Plane with Verified Autonomy Pipeline.
> Every autonomous action verified before execution.

## Docs

- [Quick Start](docs/QuickStart.md): Installation and first steps
- [API Reference](docs/API.md): Full REST API documentation
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): System design and data flow
- [Comparison](docs/COMPARISON.md): OCCP vs OpenClaw, Cordum, EV
- [Security](security/SECRETS_POLICY.md): Secret management policy
- [Roadmap](docs/ROADMAP_v080.md): v0.8.0 planned features
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
